title: Implement a biodiversity monitoring plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a biodiversity monitoring plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for monitoring biodiversity of a given area

pcs.text: Confirm site location, purpose and biodiversity monitoring techniques to be used with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site location, purpose and biodiversity monitoring techniques to be used with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site location, purpose and biodiversity monitoring techniques to be used with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify work team involved for monitoring plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work team involved for monitoring plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work team involved for monitoring plan.

pcs.text: Identify site operating conditions and hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site operating conditions and hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site operating conditions and hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble equipment and materials required for monitoring plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble equipment and materials required for monitoring plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble equipment and materials required for monitoring plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for monitoring biodiversity of a given area

elements.title: Prepare, transport and install equipment and resources

pcs.text: Select, check, maintain, and repair or replace equipment according to workplace procedures and monitoring requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, maintain, and repair or replace equipment according to workplace procedures and monitoring requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, maintain, and repair or replace equipment according to workplace procedures and monitoring requirements.

pcs.text: Transport equipment and work team to monitoring site safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport equipment and work team to monitoring site safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport equipment and work team to monitoring site safely.

pcs.text: Install and secure equipment according to operating procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install and secure equipment according to operating procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install and secure equipment according to operating procedures and regulatory requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test equipment in field conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test equipment in field conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare, transport and install equipment and resources

elements.title: Conduct biodiversity work under supervision

pcs.text: Implement operating procedure to monitor biodiversity under supervision
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement operating procedure to monitor biodiversity under supervision?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement operating procedure to monitor biodiversity under supervision.

pcs.text: Conduct observations according to monitoring plan and ethical and environmentally sensitive work practices

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct observations according to monitoring plan and ethical and environmentally sensitive work practices.

pcs.text: Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report incidents and unplanned events to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct biodiversity work under supervision

elements.title: Record biodiversity data

pcs.text: Record data according to monitoring plan and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record data according to monitoring plan and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record data according to monitoring plan and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Record location and times of observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record location and times of observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record location and times of observations.

pcs.text: Complete a summary report of activity according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete a summary report of activity according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete a summary report of activity according to workplace procedures.
